Childrearing refers to giving birth to and raising children.

It is a central element of the [[Alpha Covenant]] and necessary for the [[Church of Evolution]] to thrive and reach [[The Resurrection]].

After [[The Resurrection]] when [[immortality]] is available to all it will be less important, but still significant. However quality will raise more in importance and quality will decrease further

It contains several elements such as [[reproduction]] (including [[LGBT reproduction]]), [[early education]], and even late adulthood parental roles<ref>https://evolution.faith/family/</ref>

We are currently in a crisis of childrearing occuring due to the [[great sex strike]] and the collapse of [[patriarchy]].

== References ==
[[Category:The Pride]]
[[Category:Childrearing]]
[[Category:Family]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
